textByHash.a52ac1b5c94b31a54dd33b130386f5586b9c3dae: He is afraid. He is not ready.
textByHash.5541d940280368b05beec95faca1bf4783709eeb: I mean Drezel. How can I help?
textByHash.98f20f29aa8f29ae85082ce42e51778465368fc1: And, uh, what would you do if everything wasn't okay with me?
textByHash.1f3f790d1f79929714479e3244d0d5d7ea5f6346: Ah, good, well, I don't think...
textByHash.8c7dc7e05c5fc97c49b34c216af21d628d24fdb0: Will you do me a favour, adventurer?
textByHash.b348651f316d5f019dd0cc9193b7c2e863c77bd6: [laugh][laugh][laugh]! Really? Thanks buddy! You see that mausoleum out there? There's a horrible big dog underneath it that I'd like you to kill for me! It's been really bugging me! Barking all the time and stuff!
textByHash.8567d3429ec5897be78d1ae0508b8282e95b2a56: Please kill it for me buddy!
textByHash.14f44125d5004a7ce03de505f69cd05a99c12777: Get lost then! I have important things to do, as sure as my name is Dibzil.
textByHash.c9e750e37df34f08bfde4118e576f072f436ec6b: Ah! I want you to go kill the horrible dog in the mausoleum for me! You can use the entrance out there.
textByHash.fd539432dbe08285f54426410a4a55943d6b8fc0: You'll do this for good old Delzig, won't ya buddy?
textByHash.7ad7fc94d53df80014ca1426d907a9a2fd9329ed: [cough] for good old Drezel, right buddy?
textByHash.c48f01f3f8051c2fb594eb4033308c9257772113: You again? What do you want now?
textByHash.b8414c432871df6290a42422e0e97df107c33dc4: Nothing buddy! We're just so grateful!
